svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="事故到规则的转化闭环" id="incflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-490" dy="-82" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="事故 → 规则:复盘的终点是一条规则,不是一篇文档" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="520" x="220" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="1. 事故发生
线上故障 / 险情
误推分支·幽灵删除·越权" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffbeb;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="2. 复盘
挖根因(5 Whys)
不是「代码错了」挖到「流程漏了」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="280" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="3. 选载体
按严重度和判断复杂度
hook / 脚本 / Agent 规则" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="520" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="4. 落盘规则
写代码 · 头部注释标明来历
「来自 incident-XX,删除导致XX」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="760" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="5. 自动生效
下次同类操作被机器拦
不靠人记得" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="520" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#bfdbfe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="6. 规则库 = 事故档案
新人读规则库 = 继承经验
不用重新踩坑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="280" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="关键:复盘不落规则 = 没复盘 · 每起事故必须产出至少一条固化规则
规则库定期清理过时规则,精不要多" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="40" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s3" /> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s4" /> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s5" /> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="s5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s6" /> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 495px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 事故 → 规则:复盘的终点是一条规则,不是一篇文档

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 242, 242), rgb(35, 25, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 145px; margin-left: 56px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. 事故发生
线上故障 / 险情
误推分支·幽灵删除·越权

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.div:
2. 复盘
挖根因(5 Whys)
不是「代码错了」挖到「流程漏了」

div.div:
3. 选载体
按严重度和判断复杂度
hook / 脚本 / Agent 规则

div.div:

写代码 · 头部注释标明来历

div.div:
5. 自动生效
下次同类操作被机器拦
不靠人记得

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 280px; margin-left: 296px;

div.div:
6. 规则库 = 事故档案
新人读规则库 = 继承经验
不用重新踩坑

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 280px; margin-left: 56px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
关键:复盘不落规则 = 没复盘 · 每起事故必须产出至少一条固化规则
规则库定期清理过时规则,精不要多
